prompt:
Create a Python script called custom_metadata.py that uses the pxr library to demonstrate USD's extensibility features. The script must create a file called pipeline.usda containing:

1. Default prim /Project
2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render" (UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy" (UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide" (UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
7. /Project/Hero has custom properties:
   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Script to demonstrate USD extensibility features with custom metadata and properties.
"""

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""

    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateInMemory()

    # 1. Create default root prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform")

    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        'name': 'hero_asset',
        'identifier': 'assets/hero/v003/hero.usd'
    }
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey('assetInfo', asset_info)

    # 4-6. Create hierarchy with different purposes
    # /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
    hero_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(hero_prim)
    hero_imageable.CreatePurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

    # /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
    proxy_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(proxy_prim)
    proxy_imageable.CreatePurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

    # /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
    guide_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(guide_prim)
    guide_imageable.CreatePurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

    # 7. Add custom properties to /Project/Hero
    # String property for shotName
    shot_name_attr = hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
    shot_name_attr.Set("SH010")

    # Int2 property for frameRange
    frame_range_attr = hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
    frame_range_attr.Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

    # 8. Apply ModelAPI and set kind
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

    # Export to file
    usda_content = stage.GetRootLayer().ExportToString()

    with open("pipeline.usda", "w") as f:
        f.write(usda_content)

    print("Successfully created pipeline.usda with all required features")

    # Print summary of what was created
    print("\nUSD file contents summary:")
    print("- /Project prim with custom metadata")
    print("  - pipeline:version = 2.1")
    print("  - pipeline:department = lighting")
    print("  - assetInfo with name and identifier")
    print("- /Project/Hero hierarchy with different purposes:")
    print("  - Hero (render purpose)")
    print("  - Proxy (proxy purpose)")
    print("  - Guide (guide purpose)")
    print("- Custom properties on Hero:")
    print("  - custom:shotName = SH010")
    print("  - custom:frameRange = (1001, 1100)")
    print("- Hero prim has ModelAPI applied with kind = component")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
